modules.name: JavaScript Coding Booster Intensive
modules.description: One-day front-end production simulation in a Scrum environment. AI-assisted JavaScript development for input validation and front-end design within Microsoft Dynamics 365 ecosystems.

lessons.title: Module 1: Scrum Setup & AI-Assisted Design
topics: Scenario briefing: existing codebase review (Dynamics 365 simulation)

lessons.title: Module 2: AI-Assisted Development — Prompting & Generation
topics: Translating design artifacts into AI-assisted code (GitHub Copilot)
Balancing AI dependency with practical skills
Validating AI output against syntax and logic requirements

lessons.title: Module 4: Validation & Deployment
topics: Code review: ensuring changes don't break other systems
Daily cloud deployment via GitHub (branch merge)

assessment.title: Production Simulation Deliverables
items: AI-generated design document with flowcharts and pseudocode
Implemented input validation feature in simulated Dynamics 365 codebase
TDD test suite for validation scripts
Successful cloud deployment via GitHub with passing tests
